title: Full autonomous approval policy
objective: Let agents prepare, approve, revise, archive, and resolve governance artifacts without human intervention
problem: Current command guard and CLI reject approval-class actions in AI environments
implementationSteps: Replace human-shell rejection with truthful agent actor provenance
Allow all approval, archive, and detection-resolution CLI actions from agent shells
Keep CLI-only .intent writes, lineage, immutability, verification, and completion gates
Update workflow skills and active documentation
definitionOfDone: Agent approval commands succeed without human intervention
Full autonomous feature workflow reaches act and completion
risks: Approval no longer proves human understanding; approved becomes an agent readiness checkpoint
External host permission prompts remain outside repository control
